Meaning.En: Producing or capable of producing a high volume of sound; noisy or startlingly loud.
Meaning.Example: The concert was so loud that my ears rang for hours afterward.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả âm thanh quá to, gây khó chịu hoặc làm gián đoạn.
Situation.En: Describing a sound that is excessively loud, causing discomfort or disruption.

Situation.Vi: Người nói to để được nghe rõ trong môi trường ồn.
Situation.En: Someone speaking loudly to be heard over background noise.

Meaning.Vi: Nổi bật, chói mắt (màu sắc, phong cách)
Meaning.En: Strikingly vivid or bright; garish or showy in appearance or style.
Meaning.Example: She wore a loud shirt with neon stripes and polka dots.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả trang phục hoặc đồ vật có màu sắc quá chói, gây chú ý.
Situation.En: Describing clothing or objects with overly bright, attention-grabbing colors.
